---
title: "Updating R version"
author: "Clinton"
format: html
editor: visual
---


## To update R version
### Install the new version (for example 4.5.2)
Download and extract the specific release you want. 

```{bash}

cd /usr/local/src

sudo wget https://cran.r-project.org/src/base/R-4/R-4.5.2.tar.gz

sudo tar -xvzf R-4.5.2.tar.gz

cd R-4.5.2

```

### Configure

```{bash}

./configure \
  --prefix=/opt/R/4.5.2 \
  --enable-R-shlib \
  --with-x=no
  
```

### Compile and install

```{bash}

make -j$(nproc)

sudo make install

```

### Create a new profile

```{bash}

sudo nano /etc/profile.d/r-4.5.2.sh

# Add

export R_HOME=/opt/R/4.5.2/lib/R
export PATH=/opt/R/4.5.2/bin:$PATH

```

### Disable the old profile

```{bash}

sudo mv /etc/profile.d/r-4.3.3.sh /etc/profile.d/r-4.3.3.sh.disabled

```

### Enable the new one

```{bash}

source /etc/profile.d/r-4.5.2.sh

```

### Symlink R into the system path 

```{bash}

sudo ln -sf /opt/R/4.5.2/bin/R /usr/local/bin/R
sudo ln -sf /opt/R/4.5.2/bin/Rscript /usr/local/bin/Rscript

```
